synthetic_logic.FOF_Group: Defined by upid. If upid == -1, it is the host.
synthetic_logic.Pointer_Logic: Map depth_first_id and desc_id to SAGE pointers
topology_warnings: pointer_scope: DEPTH_FIRST_ID_BASED. Map global IDs to zero-indexed array indices.
jagged_input: Varying row lengths (32 to 61+ cols). Use robust/flexible ASCII parsers.
root_handling: Root halos use desc_id = -1. Ensure explicit bounds handling.
testing_hints: Scale: Multiply SAGE Output Mvir by 1e10 for raw input parity.
Memory: Use two-pass chunked reading for topological tracing (Pass 1: Map, Pass 2: Extract).
Tracing: Use mmp? (col 14) to identify main-progenitor branches for lifespan/MAH parity.
Distributions: Evaluate strictly at max(SnapNum) to avoid count inflation.
